mapper.select:
SELECT RNUM , knoId , knoNm , orgnztId , orgnztNm , knoTypeNm , userNm , appYmd , frstRegisterId , frstRegistPnttm , lastUpdusrId , lastUpdtPnttm
FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM desc ) as RNUM , A.KNWLDG_ID knoId , A.KNWLDG_NM knoNm , C.ORGNZT_ID orgnztId , C.ORGNZT_NM orgnztNm , B.KNWLDG_TY_NM knoTypeNm , D.Name userNm , FORMAT(CONVERT(datetime, A.EVL_DE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') appYmd , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID frstRegisterId , A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM frstRegistPnttm , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID lastUpdusrId , A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM lastUpdtPnttm
FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNDAMKNOIFM A INNER JOIN XBOLTDLM.COMTNDAMMAPKNO B ON A.KNWLDG_TY_CODE = B.KNWLDG_TY_CODE INNER JOIN XBOLTDLM.COMTNDAMMAPTEAM C ON C.ORGNZT_ID = B.ORGNZT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER D ON A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = D.LoginId WHERE A.OTHBC_AT = 'Y' AND A.KNWLDG_EVL = '1'
AND C.ORGNZT_ID = #{projectID}
AND A.KNWLDG_NM like CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{searchValue}), '%')
AND D.Name like CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{searchValue}), '%')
) brd

SELECT
Isnull(ttt.NAME, '') AS companyName
,Isnull(srarea2atr.plaintext, '') AS srarea2Name
FROM -- srArea1 xboltadm.tb_item_attr SRType, xboltadm.tb_item_attr SRArea1ATR, xboltadm.tb_item_attr SRArea1ITM INNER JOIN xboltadm.tb_item ITM1 ON ITM1.itemid = SRArea1ITM.itemid INNER JOIN xboltadm.tb_item ITM ON ITM.fromitemid = SRArea1ITM.itemid AND ITM.categorycode = 'ST1' AND ITM.deleted != 1 INNER JOIN xboltadm.tb_item ITM2 ON ITM2.itemid = ITM.toitemid INNER JOIN xboltadm.tb_item_attr SRArea2ATR ON SRArea2ATR.itemid = ITM2.itemid AND SRArea2ATR.attrtypecode = 'AT00001' AND SRArea2ATR.languageid = '1042' INNER JOIN xboltadm.tb_item_attr SRArea2T ON SRArea2T.itemid = SRArea2ATR.itemid AND SRArea2T.attrtypecode = 'AT00036' AND ( SRArea2T.plaintext = 'ITSP' OR SRArea2T.plaintext = 'CMM' OR SRArea2T.plaintext = '' ) INNER JOIN xboltapp.crm_cust_mst CCM ON itm2.clientid = CCM.customerno INNER JOIN xboltadm.tb_team_txt TTT ON TTT.teamid = CCM.teamid AND TTT.languageid = '1042' LEFT OUTER JOIN xboltadm.tb_item_attr SRArea2ATR2 ON SRArea2ATR2.itemid = SRArea2T.itemid AND SRArea2ATR2.attrtypecode = 'AT00035' AND SRArea2ATR2.languageid = '1042' LEFT OUTER JOIN xboltadm.tb_attr_type_lov TATL ON TATL.attrtypecode = 'AT00035' AND TATL.lovcode = SRArea2ATR2.plaintext AND TATL.languageid = '1042' WHERE SRType.attrtypecode = 'AT00036' AND ( SRType.plaintext = 'ITSM' OR SRType.plaintext = 'CMM' OR SRType.plaintext = '' ) AND SRType.itemid = SRArea1ITM.itemid AND SRArea1ITM.lovcode = 'LV38001' AND SRArea1ATR.attrtypecode = 'AT00001' AND SRArea1ITM.itemid = SRArea1ATR.itemid AND SRArea1ATR.languageid = '1042' AND ITM2.deleted != 1 AND srarea1itm.itemid = TRY_CAST(#{svcId1} AS INT) AND itm2.itemid = #{svcId} ORDER BY ITM2.clientid, ITM1.identifier, ITM2.identifier

SELECT knoId ,userNm ,knoNm ,orgnztId ,knoCn ,ATCH_FILE_ID ,frstRegisterId ,corpId ,svcId ,svcId1 ,symtonDesc ,RootCauseDesc From ( SELECT A.KNWLDG_ID knoId ,B.Name userNm ,A.KNWLDG_NM knoNm ,A.ORGNZT_ID orgnztId ,A.KNWLDG_CN knoCn ,A.ATCH_FILE_ID ATCH_FILE_ID ,A.FRST_REGISTER_ID frstRegisterId ,A.CORP_ID corpId ,A.SVC_CI_ID svcId ,(SELECT Top 1 FromItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ToItemID = (SELECT Top 1 ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = A.SVC_CI_ID) AND CategoryCode = 'ST1' ) AS svcId1 ,A.SYMPTON_DESC symtonDesc ,A.ROOTCAUSE_DESC RootCauseDesc FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNDAMKNOIFM A LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER B ON A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = B.LoginId WHERE KNWLDG_ID = #{knoId} ) sel

SELECT isManager
FROM XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS WHERE CC_USR_EMP_NO = #{userId}
SELECT FRST_REGISTER_ID FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNDAMKNOIFM WHERE KNWLDG_ID = #{knoId}
